textPlain: "So are we in an A.I. bubble? It sure looks like it to me. That doesn’t mean we won’t get large economic advances (and disruptions) out of A.I. "This is the most plausible looking path forward: LLMs + conventional ML + conventional software inverts how our economy operates over the next few decades, but over the next few years a lot of people are going to lose a lot of money when the singularity is actually a sigmoid curve.
